properties.entry: DELETE FROM Segment WHERE Segment.channelId IN (:channelIds)

SELECT Segment.* FROM Segment WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM UNNEST(Segment.referencedAssetDataSourceIds) AS referencedAssetDataSourceId WHERE referencedAssetDataSourceId = :referencedAssetDataSourceId ) AND Segment.state <> :state AND Segment.type = :type ORDER BY Segment.id

SELECT Segment.* FROM Segment WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM UNNEST(Segment.referencedAssetDataSourceIds) AS referencedAssetDataSourceId WHERE referencedAssetDataSourceId = :referencedAssetDataSourceId ) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM UNNEST(Segment.referencedFieldMappingIds) AS referencedFieldMappingId WHERE referencedFieldMappingId IN (:referencedFieldMappingIds) ) AND Segment.state <> :state AND Segment.type = :type ORDER BY Segment.id

SELECT Segment.* FROM Segment WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM UNNEST(Segment.referencedFieldMappingIds) AS referencedFieldMappingId WHERE referencedFieldMappingId IN (:referencedFieldMappingIds) ) AND Segment.state <> :state AND Segment.type = :type ORDER BY Segment.id
SELECT Segment.name FROM Segment WHERE Segment.channelId = :channelId AND Segment.id IN (:ids) AND Segment.status = :status GROUP BY Segment.name ORDER BY COUNT(Segment.name) DESC
SELECT Segment.name FROM Segment WHERE Segment.id IN (:ids) AND Segment.status = :status GROUP BY Segment.name ORDER BY COUNT(Segment.name) DESC
SELECT Segment.id FROM Segment WHERE Segment.name IN (:names) AND Segment.status = :status GROUP BY Segment.id ORDER BY COUNT(Segment.id) DESC

SELECT UNNEST(COALESCE(ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT referencedAssetIdsUnnest), '{}')) FROM Segment, UNNEST(Segment.referencedAssetIds) referencedAssetIdsUnnest WHERE Segment.referencedAssetIds IS NOT NULL AND Segment.referencedAssetIds <> '{}'
